2022-23 UC San Diego Tritons Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 10-20 (5-13, 9th in Big West MBB)

Coach: Eric Olen

PS/G: 68.6 (261st of 363)

PA/G: 73.0 (265th of 363)

SRS: -6.94 (254th of 363)

SOS: -0.76 (162nd of 363)

ORtg: 99.9 (279th of 363)

DRtg: 106.3 (296th of 363)
